contracts.note: Micron call buyers are hitting bids on a 15% OTM strike with only two days to expiration, with today's volume already double the existing open interest and an additional 6k contracts traded this hour. The $4.1M premium and 100% implied volatility suggest a highly speculative bet on a massive, immediate move higher, but the bid tape indicates sellers are readily exiting positions rather than aggressively exiting.

This hour saw 2025 AMKR call contracts trade on the bid, with volume at 1.6x open interest suggesting new positions are being opened. The 51-day expiration and 12% out-of-the-money strike, combined with 76% implied volatility, indicate a tactical bet on a significant upward move in the stock price over the next month and a half.
